title: Hadoop MapReduce Join Operations
description: The 'lib/join' directory houses specialized RecordReaders for managing composite joins. 'JoinRecordReader.java' defines an abstract class using PriorityQueue to handle key-value pairs from child RecordReaders, employing reflection for configuration. 'OverrideRecordReader.java' prioritizes the "rightmost" data source for a given key, maintaining a priority queue of ComposableRecordReader instances. These files exemplify the Composite and Priority Queue design patterns, enhancing Hadoop's ability to handle complex data relationships during join operations.
